zh.lifeSummary: 當Ithon DE THOUROTTE於0981年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易洛斯特時，他的父親Nocher De Thourotte32歲，母親Mathilde DE COUCY32歲。他和Gertrude DE LAON至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1039年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ithon DE THOUROTTE于0981年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易洛斯特时，他的父亲Nocher De Thourotte32岁，母亲Mathilde DE COUCY32岁。他和Gertrude DE LAON至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1039年在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ithon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an altered form of German   Itzen  .
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): metronymic from the Yiddish female personal name Ite, a pet form of the Biblical name Judith + the German Sohn ‘son’.

variants.name: Itzen
meanings: East Frisian and North German: patronymic from a Frisian short form of a personal name based on the ancient Germanic element agi ‘point, edge (of a sword)’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ithon DE THOUROTTE was born in 0981, in Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, France, his father, Nocher De Thourotte, was 32 and his mother, Mathilde DE COUCY, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Gertrude DE LAON. He died in 1039, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ithon DE THOUROTTE est né en 0981, à Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Nocher De Thourotte, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mathilde DE COUCY, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Gertrude DE LAON. Il est décédé en 1039, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ithon DE THOUROTTE 0981 in Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nocher De Thourotte 32 und seine Mutter Mathilde DE COUCY 32. Er hatte mit Gertrude DE LAON mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1039 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ithon DE THOUROTTE è nato il nel 0981 nel Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Nocher De Thourotte, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde DE COUCY, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Gertrude DE LAON. Morì nel 1039, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ithon DE THOUROTTEが0981年にフランスピカーディオイゼソウロットで生まれた時，父Nocher De Thourotteは32歳，母Mathilde DE COUCYは32歳であった。彼はGertrude DE LAONとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1039年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ithon DE THOUROTTE(이)가 0981년 프랑스 피카디 이스 토우로트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nocher De Thourotte(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde DE COUCY(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Gertrude DE LAON(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1039년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ithon DE THOUROTTE nasceu em 0981, em Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Nocher De Thourotte, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde DE COUCY, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Gertrude DE LAON. Ele faleceu em 1039, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ithon DE THOUROTTE родился в 0981 г. в местности тоуротт, оис, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Nocher De Thourotte было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde DE COUCY, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Gertrude DE LAON. Он умер в 1039 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ithon DE THOUROTTE nació en 0981, en Thourotte, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Nocher De Thourotte, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mathilde DE COUCY, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Gertrude DE LAON. Murió en 1039, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
